classification: ロケット推進サロゲート・feasibility診断制御理論
allowed_public_description: A nondimensional reduced-surrogate feasibility-diagnostic control study for rocket-propulsion-like dynamics under thermal, supply, and combined-stress constraints.
allowed_public_description_ja: 熱・供給・複合ストレス制約下のロケット推進様ダイナミクスを扱う無次元低次元サロゲート上のfeasibility診断制御研究。

publication_posture.jxiv: CONDITIONAL; keep all language as reduced-surrogate feasibility diagnostics.
